# MuleSoft Salesforce Data Cloud Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.4) of Salesforce Data Cloud Connector documentation.
> See [Salesforce Data Cloud Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-data-cloud-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Salesforce Data Cloud Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Salesforce Data Cloud Connector 1.4](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-data-cloud-connector/latest/index.md)
